mapper.select: SELECT id, username, display_name, email, password_hash, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user
SELECT id, username, display_name, email, password_hash, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, display_name, email, password_hash, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, display_name, email, password_hash) VALUES (#{username}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{passwordHash})
